вЂЋ SYNOPSISвЂЋвЂЋ вЂЋ

The world had a strange way of dropping things at Capitano's feet when he least expected it. People. Orders. Memories.

Now, apparently, cats.

But even in the snow-covered spine of a land known for its harshness and war, he knew there were some things that still deserved warmth. Even if they never asked for it.

Even if they couldn't ask for it.
